TextView.android:text:
Nutrition Essentials & Advice

1. Eat Balanced Meals
Include proteins, healthy fats, and complex carbs in every meal.

2. Prioritize Whole Foods
Choose natural, unprocessed foods over packaged items.

3. Increase Fiber Intake
Eat more beans, lentils, and whole grains for better digestion.

4. Control Portion Sizes
Use smaller plates to manage calorie intake effectively.

5. Limit Added Sugars
Reduce sweets and sugary drinks to prevent energy crashes.

6. Healthy Fats
Incorporate nuts, seeds, and olive oil into your diet.

7. Lean Proteins
Focus on poultry, fish, and plant-based proteins like tofu.

8. Colorful Vegetables
Aim for a variety of colors to get different vitamins and minerals.

9. Mindful Eating
Pay attention to hunger cues and avoid eating while distracted.

10. Preparation is Key
Plan your meals in advance to avoid unhealthy fast food choices.
